generated_oml:

]

    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraImagesTransmitted

]

    base:desc "Onboard steering angle sensor"

]

    base:desc "Physical twin component producing object tracks"

]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation component converting desired speed to motor voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation component"
]

]

    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer for onboard processing"
]

    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor control"
]

    base:desc "Functional entity for Physical Twin (ROS2 package)"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Functional entity for Digital Twin (ROS2 package)"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Functional entity for User Interface (ROS2 package)"
]

instance CrossSystemEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cross-System Entity (ROS2 package)"
]

instance LiDARPointCloudsTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraImagesTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ObjectTracksTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalObjectTrackingComponent
]

instance LiDARPointCloudsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudsTransmitted
]

instance DepthCameraImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth camera images for visual perception"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraImagesTransmitted
]

instance SQLVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing vehicle state (speed, steering angle)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedTransmitted, SteeringAngleTransmitted
]

instance SQLObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksTransmitted
]

instance DBSCANPointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN-based point cloud clustering model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink, Python38
]

instance KalmanFilterObjectTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter object tracking model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink, Python38
]

instance ISO15622ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant ACC control logic model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-process communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for performance-critical components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing and control system implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data Monitoring service for real-time visualization, data saving, and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualization, DataSaving, ReportGeneration
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation Offloading service for ACC system execution on DT"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlDecision
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote Management service for enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and emergency braking via UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACC, DisableACC, SetDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBraking
]

instance RealTimeVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of object tracks, vehicle state, and projected driving path to inform driver decisions"
]

instance DataSaving : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Saving vehicle state and object tracks to database"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ReportGeneration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generating reports from saved data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC system via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC system via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBraking : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ACCControlDecision : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Computed speed adjustment for ACC based on lead vehicle distance"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PhysicalVehicle : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle"
    base:contains NVIDIAJetsonNXAntenna, NVIDIAJetsonOrinNanoMicrocomputer, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator, VedderElectronicSpeedController, PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands (desired speed, steering adjustments, emergency braking signals) from the Digital Twin Entity to the Physical Twin Entity for actuation via ROS2 nodes."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms, as required by 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated through ISO 23247-based entities: Physical Twin Entity (sensor data processing), Digital Twin Entity (ACC computation, data storage), User Entity (visualization and control), and Cross-System Data Translation FE, interconnected via ROS2 and Wi-Fi."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, supporting real-time monitoring and remote management of the vehicle's ACC system during operational use."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 15622 for ACC functionality; latency and synchronization validated per 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication; safety-critical system constraints enforced."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-component communication within the vehicle, and Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication between physical and digital twin components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin on vehicle-mounted NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity and Data Storage hosted externally (cloud-based) for computation offloading and data retention."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for DT framework; ISO 15622 for ACC control strategy implementation."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical operations with strict latency and synchronization requirements; remote emergency braking commands implemented with safety checks, but specific cybersecurity measures not detailed in the document."
]
